notes: At Money Wellness, we offer confidential debt advice and ongoing support. There are lots of ways we help our customers, from budgeting tips to negotiating lower monthly payments with lenders to getting unaffordable debt written off. With 30 years of experience, we can help you live more and stress less.

name: StepChange Debt Charity
notes: Debt happens. Let’s deal with it. In our 30 years, StepChange have helped over five million people through challenging times. Use our free and flexible online advice service with expert debt advisors on-hand to help you explore your options to pay, manage or write off debt.

name: Citizens Advice
notes:
If you’re having issues with money or debt, you can:
  talk to us online about a debt problem using chat - we can usually help between 9am and 8pm Monday to Friday and between 9.30am and 1pm Saturday
  call our debt helpline - it's available 9am to 8pm Monday to Friday and 9.30am to 1pm Saturday

Debt helpline: 0800 240 4420

Relay UK - if you can't hear or speak on the phone, you can type what you want to say: 18001 then 0800 240 4420
You can use Relay UK with an app or a textphone. There's no extra charge to use it. Find out how to use Relay UK on the Relay UK website.

The debt helpline is not available on public holidays.
Calls are free from mobiles and landlines.

name: West Lothian Council � Advice Shop

Help to access different government schemes for dealing with debts
